name: Chocolate Indulgence
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, melt the chocolate and butter together.
2. Gradually add the powdered sugar and flour, stirring constantly with a wire whisk.
3. Add the egg yolks one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
4. Stir in the vanilla extract.
5. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gently fold the beaten egg whites into the chocolate mixture.
7. Pour all but 1 cup of the mixture into a buttered 8x8-inch pan.
8. Add the remaining 1 cup of sour cream to the reserved batter and spread evenly over the top.
9. Bake at 375°F for 25 minutes. The center will not look done or set.
10. Allow the chocolate mousse to cool completely, then cover and refrigerate for 4-6 hours.
11. Cut into 1 1/2 inch squares using a hot knife.
12. Individual pieces can be wrapped and frozen.
